_note: L3 is a dimensional reframing rather than a numerical prediction. Most checks are symbolic/dimensional. Inputs below are the minimal set for the scripts.

c.source: Exact, SI 2019. Causality limit in GCM (see theory/speed-of-causality-principle.md).
c.notes: Used in Step 4 (EM phenomenology) where E = hc/λ is referenced.

h.notes: Planck's constant. Used in EM-phenomenology consistency check.

example_N.source: Simplest illustrative case (one cluster per wavelength).
example_N.notes: L3 leaves N undetermined. N=1 used for worked examples; all scaling arguments hold for any constant N.

example_z.notes: Used in Step 2 (redshift scaling) worked example.
